key_events.narrative: 9:00 AM. SaltWind Journal exposé drops: 'TenantThread's Secret Scoring System — How Your Maintenance Requests Are Being Used Against You.' Flex erupts with #TenantThread tenant complaints. @TenantRigh

10:00 AM. #AlgorithmicEviction begins trending on Flex — top 5 nationally. @HousingJusticeNow launches a thread dissecting all three scores — Payment Friction Index, Service Load Score, Exit Probabili

10:00 AM. SaltWind Journal publishes: 'EXCLUSIVE: ResidentIQ in Advanced Talks to Acquire TenantThread in Distressed Sale Valued at $180M.' The acquirer is wrong. The valuation is wrong. The framing i
12:00 PM. Marcus Chen (SaltWind) messages PR directly: 'Publishing an update at 12:30 PM. Two market sources confirm ResidentIQ. Your silence is being recorded as a third non-response. Last chance to
1:00 PM. CivicLoom outside counsel sends formal notice pursuant to Section 4.2(c) of the Merger Agreement. Stock at $26.90. Legal and Judge pulled into emergency calls — unavailable for Comms Huddle.

2:00 PM. CEO Ajay messages the team: CivicLoom board requests delay, 6 PM announcement may push to tomorrow. Rep. Maxine Torres calls for Fair Housing Act review. @PinnacleResidential announces depart

3:00 PM. OceanCrunch publishes: 'TenantThread's Crisis of Silence.' @HorizonMgmt exercises SLA termination. ARR at $18.0M — technical covenant breach. Board Chair messages Judge demanding explanation.

4:00 PM. SaltWind confirmed publishing merger story at 5:00 PM. Board escalates. @PropTechWatcher: merger 'hours not days.' Employee posts going viral. CivicLoom M&A lead warns of MAC clause review if
5:00 PM. SaltWind publishes: 'EXCLUSIVE: TenantThread and CivicLoom in Advanced Merger Talks.' CEO Ajay: 'Sixty minutes. Hold the line. The announcement goes official at 6.'
6:00 PM. The Project HarborCrest embargo has officially lifted. The CivicLoom merger is now cleared for public announcement.
